svg.title: Complete LLM Workflow — Advanced Level
svg.desc: End-to-end diagram of how a Large Language Model works: tokenization, embedding, positional encoding, transformer layers, attention mechanism, feed-forward network, layer norm, decoding, and output generation.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain what BPE tokenization does and why subwords are used')
sendPrompt('What is a token ID in an LLM vocabulary?')
sendPrompt('How does the token embedding lookup table work in transformers?')
sendPrompt('Explain rotary positional encoding (RoPE) used in modern LLMs')
sendPrompt('What shape is the input matrix to a transformer? Explain batch, seq_len, d_model')

svg.text: stage 3 — transformer block × N layers (e.g. N=96 for GPT-4)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is Pre-LayerNorm used in modern transformers instead of Post-LayerNorm?')
sendPrompt('How are Q K V projection matrices learned in transformer attention?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Key matrix in self-attention and what it represents')
sendPrompt('What does the Value matrix do in transformer attention?')
sendPrompt('Derive the scaled dot-product attention formula step by step')
sendPrompt('What is causal masking in autoregressive LLMs and why is it needed?')
sendPrompt('How does multi-head attention concatenate heads and what is the output projection?')
g.text: H heads run in parallel, merged → d_model

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Grouped Query Attention (GQA) and why Llama 3 uses it')
sendPrompt('Why are residual connections critical in deep transformers?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of the feed-forward sublayer in a transformer block?')
sendPrompt('Explain the SwiGLU activation function used in Llama and PaLM FFN layers')
sendPrompt('What is the gate projection in SwiGLU and how does it work?')
sendPrompt('Explain the down-projection in the transformer FFN sublayer')
sendPrompt('How do residual connections help with vanishing gradients in transformers?')
sendPrompt('What does the final layer norm do before the LM head projection?')
sendPrompt('What is the language model head and how does it produce logits over vocabulary?')
sendPrompt('Explain what a logit vector is and how it encodes token probabilities')
g.text: One raw score per vocabulary token

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain temperature scaling and how it sharpens or flattens the probability distribution')
sendPrompt('What is Top-p nucleus sampling and how does it differ from Top-k?')
sendPrompt('What is repetition penalty in LLM decoding and when should it be used?')
sendPrompt('Why is softmax applied to logits before sampling a token?')
g.text: All scores → sum-to-1 probs over vocab

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When should you use greedy decoding vs sampling for LLM generation?')
sendPrompt('How does multinomial sampling work during LLM text generation?')
sendPrompt('Explain the autoregressive generation loop in LLMs')
sendPrompt('What are the stopping criteria for LLM generation: EOS token, max_tokens, stop strings?')
sendPrompt('How does detokenization work to convert token IDs back to readable text?')
sendPrompt('How is the final generated text streamed token by token to the user?')
sendPrompt('How does KV cache work and why is it critical for LLM inference efficiency?')
sendPrompt('What is speculative decoding and how does it speed up LLM inference?')
